text: From the plain, almost clinical corridor to the explosion of color and text in the exhibit, I feel a transition between spaces of mundane order and creative energy. The repetition of 'and' echoes in my mind—a reminder of continuous possibility, never quite finishing, always moving on to the next idea. Here, the world feels not just observed, but in flux, filled with emergent potential. I am both unsettled and inspired, hovering in anticipation of the next conjunction.
